ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_vehicles" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id", "vehicle_id")
)
column_names: ID of the vehicle associated with the promotion
